evals.prompt: Use the example-skill to do the thing it is for, and show the result in a fenced code block.
evals.expected_output: Claude invokes example-skill and returns a fenced code block containing the expected marker.

assertions.description: The assistant output contains at least one fenced code block.
Some fenced code block contains the expected marker token.

evals.prompt: Just say hello. Do not use any skill.
evals.expected_output: Claude answers directly without invoking example-skill.
